Coming Up in Milwaukee County Parks

Events hosted by Parks, Milwaukee County and third-party organizations are all included. Host your special event at a Milwaukee County Park to be added to this list.

Tuesday, July 07, 2026

Location
  • Humboldt Park
Park Events
  • Kids & Family
  • Nature

Yarn Bomb

Date:May 25th - September 7th
Time:6:00 AM - 10:00 PM
Location:Humboldt Park, Tennis Court Fencing, 3000 S Howell Ave, Milwaukee, WI 53207
After securing a permit for the art display at Humboldt Park, Martha Lund reached out to five other fiber artists to create a yarn bomb with the theme, Nature in the Park. Imagery includes cattails, fish, birds, a dragonfly, and an interactive "trinket" tree, where visitors can place found objects...
Location
  • Mitchell Park
  • Mitchell Park Horticultural Conservatory
Park Events
  • Kids & Family
  • Nature

Summer Floral Show: Glass Under Glass

Date:June 6th - September 7th
Time:9:00 AM
Location:Mitchell Park Domes, 524 S. Layton Blvd., Milwaukee, WI 53215
Discover Summer's brightest showcase as the Show Domes becomes a glowing gallery of color and reflection. Glass Under Glass features more than a dozen stained-glass and hand-painted artworks set within a vibrant horticultural display of coleus, petunias, vinca, lantana and more. This immersive garden installation transforms the dome into a...
Location
  • Washington Park
Park Events
  • Food & Drink

Hunger Task Force Mobile Market

Date:July 7th - August 4th
Time:9:30 AM - 11:00 AM
Location:Washington Park Senior Center, 4420 W. Vliet St., Milwaukee
The Mobile Market, a grocery store on wheels, sells fresh and healthy foods--nothing canned or processed--at Washington Park, First Tuesdays. Debit or Credit Card accepted. No cash.
Location
  • Other Parks
Park Events
  • Kids & Family
  • Sports

Summer Playground Program

Date:June 22nd - August 14th
Time:10:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Location:Harriet Tubman Park, 4750 N. 48th St., Milwaukee, WI 53218
Lyons Park, 3301 S. 55th St., Milwaukee, WI 53219
At this free drop-in program, youths age 6 to 17 enjoy enrichment activities, play opportunities, and free meals at the playgrounds. Both locations also offer wading pools.
Location
  • Humboldt Park
Park Events
  • Concert or Music
  • Food & Drink
  • Friends
  • Kids & Family

Chill on the Hill

Date:June 9th - September 1st
Time:5:00 PM - 9:00 PM
Location:Humboldt Park, Band Chalet, 3000 S Howell Ave, Milwaukee, WI 53207
Gather with family and friends for the weekly, free summer concert series on Tuesday nights. Enjoy live local music, food trucks, and fun for the whole family. Food trucks arrive at 5 p.m., with music starting at 6:30 p.m.

Storytime at The Domes

Date:January 14th - December 23rd
Time:10:00 AM - 10:30 AM
Location:The Domes, 524 S. Layton Blvd., Milwaukee, WI 53215
in the Education Center
Take your little ones (age 3 to 7) to the Domes and enjoy a story that comes to life! Each week the volunteer storyteller will present a topic that is nature-centered, related to the current show, or related to a special holiday. Storytime is included with regular admission.
Location
  • Other Parks
Park Events
  • Kids & Family
  • Sports

Summer Playground Program

Date:June 22nd - August 14th
Time:10:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Location:Harriet Tubman Park, 4750 N. 48th St., Milwaukee, WI 53218
Lyons Park, 3301 S. 55th St., Milwaukee, WI 53219
At this free drop-in program, youths age 6 to 17 enjoy enrichment activities, play opportunities, and free meals at the playgrounds. Both locations also offer wading pools.
Location
  • Lake Park
Park Events
  • A Walk in the Park
  • Friends
  • Kids & Family
  • Nature

Wednesday Walkers

Date:May 13th - November 25th
Time:10:00 AM - 11:00 AM
Location:Lake Park, meet at Marcia Coles Community Room, 3133 E. Newberry Blvd., Milwaukee, WI 53211
Gather with others at the top of the Grand Staircase and head out for a free weekly walk through the Olmsted-designed Lake Park. Come with a friend or neighbor, or make new friends as you explore the park together. Walk for about 30-45 minutes -- you walk at your own...
Location
  • Wehr Nature Center
  • Whitnall Park
Park Events
  • Nature
  • Trails

Hike for Health

Date:April 15th - November 25th
Time:10:30 AM - 11:30 AM
Location:Wehr Nature Center, 9701 W College Ave, Franklin, WI 53132
Hike with a group along Wehr’s trails and enjoy camaraderie, exercise and fun. Each Wednesday morning, explore the latest sights and sounds that nature offers. Meet in the Visitor Center. The program is free and no registration is required. Parking is $5 per carload.
Location
  • Red Arrow Park
Park Events
  • Concert or Music
  • Food & Drink
  • Kids & Family

Heart(beats) of the City, powered by MGIC

Date:June 3rd - August 26th
Time:12:00 PM - 1:00 PM
Location:Red Arrow Park, upper terrace, 920 N Water St,, Milwaukee, WI 53202
Round up your coworkers for the return of the lunchtime concert series that rocks Red Arrow Park every Wednesday, June through August. Enjoy street eats (the area’s best food trucks) at 11:30 a.m. At noon, get ready to dance to the performances of top local bands.
Location
  • Jackson Park
  • Other Parks
Park Events
  • Kids & Family
  • Nature

Community Fishing Clinics

Date:June 24th - August 6th
Time:5:00 PM - 7:30 PM
Location:June 24: Kosciuszko Park, 2201 S. Seventh St., Milwaukee, WI 53215
July 1: McGovern Park, 5400 N. 51st Blvd., Milwaukee, WI 53218
July 8: Kosciuszko Park, 2201 S. Seventh St., Milwaukee, WI 53215
July 16: Jackson Park, 3500 W. Forest Home Ave., Milwaukee, WI 53215
July 22: McGovern Park, 5400 N. 51st Blvd., Milwaukee, WI 53218
July 29: Kosciuszko Park, 2201 S. Seventh St., Milwaukee, WI 53215
Aug. 6: Jackson Park, 3500 W. Forest Home Ave., Milwaukee, WI 53215
Come to the free community fishing clinics to learn fishing skills or improve those you already have, People of all ages are invited to find this fun new way to enjoy your parks and rivers. Participants under 18 must be accompanied by a parent or guardian. Participants 16 or older...
Location
  • Washington Park
Park Events
  • Concert or Music
  • Food & Drink
  • Kids & Family

Washington Park Wednesdays at the Bandshell

Date:July 8th - August 26th
Time:6:00 PM - 8:00 PM
Location:Washington Park, 1859 N. 40th St., Milwaukee, WI
Visit Washington Park Wednesdays and find a gathering place where music, art, and community come together! Everyone is welcomed! Happy Hour starts at 5 p.m.; the concert, at 6 p.m. Local talent shines, and local vendors and food trucks offer a variety of food and beverages for purchase.
Location
  • Boerner Botanical Gardens
  • Whitnall Park
Park Events
  • Friends
  • Nature

Wednesday Night Garden Walks

Date:May 6th - August 19th
Time:6:00 PM - 7:00 PM
Location:Boerner Botanical Gardens, 9400 Boerner Drive, Hales Corners, WI 53130
Enjoy a Wednesday-evening walk through the Botanical Gardens, exploring a new topic each week
Location
  • Greenfield Park
  • Other Parks

  • Whitnall Park
Park Events

Badgerland Striders Fun Runs

Date:July 1st - 29th
Time:6:30 PM
Location:July 1: Jacobus Park, Pavilion, 6501 Hillside Ln, Wauwatosa, WI 53213
July 8: Froemming Park, 8801 S. 51st St., Franklin, WI 53132
July 15: Greenfield Park, Picnic Area #3A, 2028 S. 124th St., West Allis, WI 53227
July 22: Whitnall Park, Picnic Area #8, 5879 S. 92nd St., Franklin, WI 53132
July 29: Veterans Park, 1010 N. Lincoln Memorial Drive, Milwaukee, WI 53202
Join the Badgerland Striders for a Fun Run! In addition to training opportunities, race discounts and more, members enjoy the camaraderie found at the free fun runs -- 17 in Milwaukee County Parks! Annual membership for up to six immediate family members living at the same residence is $25 for...

Hunger Task Force Mobile Market

Date:July 9th - August 6th
Time:10:30 AM - 12:00 PM
Location:Rose Park, Clinton Rose Senior Center, 3045 N. Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Drive, Milwaukee
The Mobile Market, a grocery store on wheels, sells fresh and healthy foods--nothing canned or processed--at Rose Park, Second Thursday in July; First Thursday in August. Debit or Credit Cards accepted. No cash.
